message:
feat(deps,cli,tui): enable Kafka transport, harden DB migration, add border-row click guards

- Enable rdkafka feature on asupersync dep to support Kafka-based
  message transport alongside the existing NATS/Redis backends
- Add explicit drop(source_conn) before file copy in
  copy_python_database_to_rust() to ensure the SQLite connection is
  fully released before the filesystem copy, preventing potential
  locked-file issues on platforms with mandatory file locking
- Add test for create_db_backup() error path when source DB is missing
- Add tests for bottom-border-row click rejection in both message
  browser and search cockpit TUI screens, ensuring mouse clicks on
  the decorative border row don't incorrectly select a result item

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
